name: Bargello
description: Stacked nested chevrons in graded bands, the flame stitch re-flowing on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 180deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 30%, 100% 0, 100% 30%, 50% 60%, 0 30%); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 30%, 100% 0, 100% 30%, 50% 60%, 0 30%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 40%; width: 100%; height: 60%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 50%, 100% 0, 100% 30%, 50% 80%, 0 30%); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 50%, 100% 0, 100% 30%, 50% 80%, 0 30%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
